mechanism: The basis trade functions as synthetic QE, removing duration from private markets and compressing measured term premium by 15-25bp below fair value. Its unwind would release suppressed term premium, with partial unwind (20-40%) adding ~5-10bp and full unwind potentially adding 15-25bp.
regime_dependence: Active as long as the trade is profitable (positive cash-futures basis) and repo financing is available. Vulnerable to margin calls, regulatory action, or funding market stress.
